sn22.118:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, what do you think, do you regard form thus: ‘This is mine, this I am, this is my self’?"
sn22.118:1.3: "Good, bhikkhus! Form should be seen as it really is with correct wisdom thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self.’
sn22.118:1.4: "Do you regard feeling … perception … volitional formations …sn.iii.166consciousness thus: ‘This is mine, this I am, this is my self’?"
sn22.118:1.6: "Good, bhikkhus! Consciousness should be seen as it really is with correct wisdom thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self.’
sn22.118:1.7: "Seeing thus … He understands: ‘ … there is no more for this state of being.’"
